privileged_info_summary: The task is to create three synthetic facility records in CAMEO Data Manager version 4.5.1 with specific coordinates in the Houston, Texas area (29.7001,-95.3001 and nearby). Target facilities are 'Riverview Water Treatment' and 'Riverview High School' (both in Riverview, TX). A distractor facility 'Hilltop Cold Storage' (in Hilltop, TX at 30.1001,-95.5001) must not be included in the export. The agent must filter to find only the 2 Riverview facilities and export them to 'riverview_facilities.kml' on the Desktop. All metadata values correctly reflect the task requirements.
